description_long: This counter features a robust rectangular frame with a central block flanked by two lower, boxy sections, all unified under a thick, black horizontal top. The central section is dark gray with two square, recessed areas resembling windows or display panels, and a triangular warning or information sign below, partially obscured by white scuff marks. The side sections are blue, each also bearing a triangular sign and significant white weathering, suggesting heavy outdoor use. The entire structure appears to be made of metal, with a glossy, slightly worn finish, and the surfaces show signs of exposure to the elements. The back and sides are plain, with the blue and black color scheme continuing, and the top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for supporting objects. This counter is likely intended for use in public urban environments such as transit stations, ticket booths, or information kiosks.
description: A sturdy, weathered metal counter with a black frame, blue side panels, and a central gray section featuring recessed panels and warning signs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central gray section with two recessed panels and triangular signs on all three sections, with visible weathering.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the counter and the thickness of the black frame, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain blue and black surfaces, with no visible signage or recessed panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the profile and the triangular sign faintly visible on the blue section.
